title: HTTP Caching, Freshness, Validators, Vary, and Invalidation · Automation and Data Client Systems
description: A public-data mirror uses validators and local metadata but has confused stale files, 304 metadata, Vary, and authenticated responses. Learners cumulatively produce a Python 3.14 urllib and HTTP client layers spec-aware cache decision notebook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish private, shared, gateway, browser, and application caches plus who may reuse stored responses. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.

Compute freshness from explicit directives, dates, age, and response context rather than wall-clock intuition. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.

Use ETag and Last-Modified validators with If-None-Match or If-Modified-Since and interpret 304 correctly. Demonstrate the result through Python 3.14 urllib, http.client, ssl, typed protocols, and fixture transports.
